    Default number of general-purpose registers
    removeListener(IExecutionContextListener) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContext
    Removes a previously registered execution context listener.
    resetProgrammeCounter() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContext
    Resets the programme counter to its initial state.
    resetProgrammeCounter() - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ConcreteExecutionContext
    Resets the programme counter to 0

    Returns the value of the result record component.
